Video.summary: Start your journey with two men giving different yet powerful critiques of the church.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: Prophets of Reform before Protestantism

Image.alt: Prophets of Reform before Protestantism
Prophets of Reform before Protestantism
Prophets of Reform before Protestantism

Video.summary: Delve into the early Reformation, which begins with Martin Luther and his 95 Theses.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: Luther and the Dawn of Protestantism

Image.alt: Luther and the Dawn of Protestantism
Luther and the Dawn of Protestantism
Luther and the Dawn of Protestantism

Video.summary: Take a look at several thinkers who were more radical than Martin Luther.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: Zwingli, Calvin, and the Reformed Tradition

Image.alt: Zwingli, Calvin, and the Reformed Tradition
Zwingli, Calvin, and the Reformed Tradition
Zwingli, Calvin, and the Reformed Tradition

Video.summary: Here, meet the most radical of rebels: the Anabaptists.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: The Anabaptist Radicals

Image.alt: The Anabaptist Radicals
The Anabaptist Radicals
The Anabaptist Radicals

Video.summary: Survey the founding of the Jesuits and the role of education in the Catholic Reformation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: The Catholic Reformation

Image.alt: The Catholic Reformation
The Catholic Reformation
The Catholic Reformation

Video.summary: See how Queen Isabella and King Ferdinand created a unified Catholic nation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: The Church Militant in the Spanish Empire

Image.alt: The Church Militant in the Spanish Empire
The Church Militant in the Spanish Empire
The Church Militant in the Spanish Empire

Video.summary: Was the Thirty Years' War truly a religious war or a political ploy to depose kings?
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: War and Witchcraft in the Holy Roman Empire

Image.alt: War and Witchcraft in the Holy Roman Empire
War and Witchcraft in the Holy Roman Empire
War and Witchcraft in the Holy Roman Empire

Video.summary: Follow the Puritans from England, where they wrestled with theology on their own terms.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity II: From the Reformation to the Modern Megachurch
Video.title: Puritans, Kings, and Theology in Practice

Image.alt: Puritans, Kings, and Theology in Practice
Puritans, Kings, and Theology in Practice
Puritans, Kings, and Theology in Practice

Video.summary: This episode discusses the difficulties for Christians in ascertaining how to follow Jesus today.
Video.title: Introduction-What Makes a Great Christian?

Image.alt: Introduction-What Makes a Great Christian?
Introduction-What Makes a Great Christian?
Introduction-What Makes a Great Christian?

Video.summary: Trace Paul's travels and get a sense of the man who was tireless in spreading the Gospel.
Video.title: Paul and the First Christian Missionaries

Image.alt: Paul and the First Christian Missionaries
Paul and the First Christian Missionaries
Paul and the First Christian Missionaries

Video.summary: This episode examines why Christians have often died for their faith, and introduces the martyrs.
Video.title: The Early Martyrs

Image.alt: The Early Martyrs
The Early Martyrs
The Early Martyrs

Video.summary: Look at St. Antony's life, his discipline, and his insights about the value of solitude.
Video.title: St. Antony, the First Monk

Image.alt: St. Antony, the First Monk
St. Antony, the First Monk
St. Antony, the First Monk

Video.summary: The writings of desert monks are full of tough-minded wisdom gained in the struggle against themselves.
Video.title: The Desert Fathers and Mothers

Image.alt: The Desert Fathers and Mothers
The Desert Fathers and Mothers
The Desert Fathers and Mothers

Video.summary: Meet one of the most important Christian writers: Augustine, whose conversion infuses his work.
Video.title: Augustine

Video.summary: St. Patrick brought the gift of faith to his captors and made Ireland a Christian stronghold.
Video.title: St. Patrick and the Conversion of Ireland

Image.alt: St. Patrick and the Conversion of Ireland
St. Patrick and the Conversion of Ireland
St. Patrick and the Conversion of Ireland

Video.summary: Monks' lives were disorganized until Benedict transformed monastic life with The Rule of St. Benedict.
Video.title: St. Benedict and His Rule

Image.alt: St. Benedict and His Rule
St. Benedict and His Rule
St. Benedict and His Rule

Video.summary: Learn about different scholarly views of the historical Jesus.
Video.title: Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Image.alt: Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Video.summary: In the ancient world, there were many accounts of "divine" mortals. Explore ancient models of divine men.
Video.title: Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human

Image.alt: Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human
Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human
Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human

Video.summary: Delve further into the interface between the human and the divine in pagan cultures.
Video.title: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World

Image.alt: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World

Video.summary: In Genesis and Exodus, explore conceptions of divine beings that appear in human form.
Video.title: Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism

Image.alt: Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism
Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism
Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism

Video.summary: Learn about the divine figure of the Son of Man, and the Jewish conception of a "second God".
Video.title: Ancient Jews Who Were Gods

Image.alt: Ancient Jews Who Were Gods
Ancient Jews Who Were Gods
Ancient Jews Who Were Gods

Video.summary: Consider why the New Testament Gospels are the only useful early sources on the life of Jesus.
Video.title: The Life and Teachings of Jesus

Image.alt: The Life and Teachings of Jesus
The Life and Teachings of Jesus
The Life and Teachings of Jesus

Video.summary: Explore what Jesus said about himself.
Video.title: Did Jesus Think He Was God?

Image.alt: Did Jesus Think He Was God?
Did Jesus Think He Was God?
Did Jesus Think He Was God?

Video.summary: Regarding Jesus's final days, review the events that we know about.
Video.title: The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties

Image.alt: The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties
The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties
The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties
